# QuickTextFormatter
> A precision text case converter and analyzer tool for converting between title case (AP/Chicago), sentence case, uppercase, lowercase, and related styles.

## Features
- [Case Converter](https://www.quicktextformatter.com/) - Live browser-based case conversion and text editor.
- [Formatting Guide](https://www.quicktextformatter.com/guide) - Rules for title casing, AP style, and Chicago style.
- [Analytics Guide](https://www.quicktextformatter.com/analytics-guide) - Explanation of character, word, and sentence counts.

## Information
- [About Us](https://www.quicktextformatter.com/about) - Learn more about the QuickTextFormatter suite.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.quicktextformatter.com/privacy) - Policies regarding cookie consent and usage data.
- [Terms of Use](https://www.quicktextformatter.com/terms) - Standard platform usage terms.
